outages.boundary: S HIGLEY RD TO S 172ND ST AND E RIGGS RD TO E COLDWATER BLVD
outages.comments: Electrical equipment has been hit or damaged. SRP crews are working to restore power.

outages.boundary: S 43RD AVE TO S CHANDLER BLVD AND W ESTRELLA DR TO W PECOS RD

outages.boundary: N DELAWARE DR TO N IRONWOOD DR AND W SUPERSTITION BLVD TO W APACHE TRL
outages.comments: An SRP maintenance crew is performing critical maintenance work to repair or upgrade equipment. Power will be restored as quickly as possible.
